kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Insert Into List
kw.doc: Inserts ``value`` into ``list`` to the position specified with ``index``.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=Robot Framework remote server binary not found (${DIRECTORY}/${BINARY_NAME}). Did you forget to build it in ${CONFIGURATION} configuration?
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

branch.condition: not ${SKIP_RUNNING_SERVER} and not ${SERVER_REMOTE_DEBUG} and not '${SYSTEM}' == 'Windows' and not ${NET_PLATFORM}

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

branch.condition: not ${SKIP_RUNNING_SERVER} and ${SERVER_REMOTE_DEBUG} and not '${SYSTEM}' == 'Windows' and not ${NET_PLATFORM}

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: Windows doesn't support server remote debug option.
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Import Library
kw.doc: Imports a library with the given name and optional arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String Using Regexp
kw.doc: Replaces ``pattern`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

test.name: LED Toggles On Via Button Interrupt

kw.name: Wait For Line On Uart
kw.msg:
InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!
Full report: ([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:27 PM, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success) [host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] Hello from STM32 NUCLEO-F411RE... [host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] UART DEBUG CONSOLE (System Ready) [host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] press: CTRL+H for options [host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] [host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] [[no newline]] ([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:36 PM, virt: 8101.8] Line containing >>BTN Pressed...<< event: failure)

InvalidOperationException: at (wrapper managed-to-native) System.Reflection.MonoMethod.InternalInvoke(System.Reflection.MonoMethod,object,object[],System.Exception&) at System.Reflection.MonoMethod.Invoke (System.Object obj, System.Reflection.BindingFlags invokeAttr, System.Reflection.Binder binder, System.Object[] parameters, System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture) [0x0006a] in <aeea2e33ea654cfabae63b60ba0e127a>:0

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.
kw.msg:
Arguments: [ 'InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!

Full report:
([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:27 PM, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success)
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] Hello from STM32 NUCLEO-F411RE...
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] UART DEBUG CONSOLE (System Ready)
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] press: CTRL+H for options
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] 
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] 
 [[no newline]]
([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:36 PM, virt: 8101.8] Line containing >>BTN Pressed...<< event: failure)

' | mode='right' ]

Return: 'InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!

Full report:
([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:27 PM, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success)
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] Hello from STM32 NUCLEO-F411RE...
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] UART DEBUG CONSOLE (System Ready)
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] press: CTRL+H for options
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] 
[host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] 
 [[no newline]]
([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:36 PM, virt: 8101.8] Line containing >>BTN Pressed...<< event: failure)'

${message} = InvalidOperationException: Terminal tester failed!
Full report: ([host: 4/18/2026 3:33:27 PM, virt: 0] Attached to UART event: success) [host: 4/18/2026 3:33:28 PM, virt: 0] Hello from ST...

kw.name: Set Test Message
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Timeout Occurred
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword if either a test or a keyword timeout has occurred.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: Arguments: [ 'UART_debug_console.LED Toggles On Via Button Interrupt.fail0.save' ]
Return: 'UART_debug_console.LED Toggles On Via Button Interrupt.fail0.save'
${test_name} = UART_debug_console.LED Toggles On Via Button Interrupt.fail0.save

kw.name: Sanitize Test Name
kw.msg: Arguments: [ ${test_name}='UART_debug_console.LED Toggles On Via Button Interrupt.fail0.save' ]

kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

test.status:

4) Connection to remote server broken: [Errno 111] Connection refused

kw.name: Wait For Process
kw.doc: Waits for the process to complete or to reach the given timeout.
